content: PostHog Query API (/api/project/:id/query, HogQL) rate-limited to 120 requests/hour when authenticated with a personal API key. Responses cached by default (check is_cached). Personal API key needs Query Read scope and is server-only secret. Cold-start + network latency makes synchronous server-component PostHog queries slow; an admin dashboard hitting many insights per load can exhaust 120/hr quickly.
